Name: Handmade Silk Scarf
Description: Authentic hand-loomed silk from local weavers using natural dyes.
Roadmap: 1. Build a 'Heritage' brand story. 2. Partner with luxury boutiques in Paris. 3. Get GI tagging certification.

Name: Terracotta Pottery
Description: Traditional clay pots made by village artisans for sustainable cooling.
Roadmap: 1. Design modular storage for urban homes. 2. Use shock-proof eco-packaging. 3. Market as plastic-free health-ware.

Name: Pink Enamel Inlay
Description: Gulabi Meenakari - rare pink enameling on silver jewelry.
Roadmap: 1. Showcase at international jewelry fairs. 2. Launch a custom-design web portal. 3. Collaborate with fashion influencers.

Name: Wooden Toy Craft
Description: Hand-carved wooden toys painted with natural lacquers.
Roadmap: 1. Market as non-toxic, sustainable alternatives. 2. Bulk-export to European educational stores. 3. Create DIY assembly kits.

Name: Banarasi Glass Beads
Description: World-famous glass beads used in global high-fashion jewelry.
Roadmap: 1. Direct-to-designer B2B sales. 2. Open a 'Make Your Own' experience center. 3. Expand into wearable tech accessories.

Name: Zardosi Embroidery
Description: Intricate gold and silver thread work on silk fabrics.
Roadmap: 1. Digitize patterns for bespoke orders. 2. Collaborate with global bridal-wear designers. 3. Start a high-end repair service.

Name: Chunar Stone Work
Description: Hand-carved soft stone sculptures and lattice (jaali) work.
Roadmap: 1. Sell as luxury architectural interior elements. 2. Create smaller, shippable home decor pieces. 3. Use 3D scanning for replicas.

Name: Bhadohi Carpets
Description: Hand-knotted carpets with unique traditional motifs.
Roadmap: 1. Use AR to let customers visualize rugs in their homes. 2. Launch 'Fair Trade' collections. 3. Focus on custom hotel contracts.

Name: Copper Enamelware
Description: Vibrant enameled copper plates and kitchenware.
Roadmap: 1. Reposition as luxury designer tableware. 2. Partner with Michelin-star restaurants. 3. Sell via high-end kitchenware retailers.

Name: Bamboo Cane Crafts
Description: Traditional furniture and mats made from locally sourced bamboo.
Roadmap: 1. Develop flat-pack bamboo furniture designs. 2. Promote as zero-carbon footprint furniture. 3. Export to eco-conscious office spaces.
